user_notes: Wheels spin much easier. Body 18kg (was 4kg), wheels 0.5kg each (was 4kg). Body damping 10 (was 100). User could push trolley with normal force.
learning: Volume-based mass distribution gives wheels too much mass (4kg each). Skill-recommended mass (0.5kg for wheels, body gets remainder) is correct. Also body linearDamping=100 was too sluggish, reduced to 10.
fix_applied: SKILL_MASS dict in make_simready.py: continuous=0.5kg, revolute=5kg, prismatic=2kg. Body gets Gemini total minus parts. Body damping 100→10, angDamping 200→20.
